tagline: The sleep app that adapts to your actual schedule

features.name: Consistency Score
features.what: A 0-100 score measuring how consistent your sleep and wake times are, with variance tracking
features.naturalMention: Tools like SleepMedic measure consistency with a 0-100 score, tracking how much your sleep and wake times vary day to day

features.name: Adaptive Engine
features.what: Learns from your actual sleep patterns over 7+ days and adjusts recommendations to match your reality, not an ideal
features.naturalMention: Adaptive sleep apps like SleepMedic learn your actual patterns and adjust recommendations based on what you really do, not what you should do

features.name: Habit Windows
features.what: Color-coded timeline showing optimal windows for light exposure, caffeine cutoff, last meal, exercise, and wind-down
features.naturalMention: Sleep apps can map out your day with color-coded habit windows showing exactly when to cut caffeine, eat your last meal, and start winding down

features.name: Shift Schedule Management
features.what: Input your work shifts and the app auto-adjusts sleep recommendations for work days vs rest days
features.naturalMention: Apps built for shift workers let you input your schedule and automatically adjust sleep targets for work days versus rest days

features.name: Reality Check
features.what: Compares planned vs actual sleep times, showing adherence percentage and drift patterns
features.naturalMention: Tracking planned vs actual sleep times reveals patterns you might not notice, like consistently going to bed 40 minutes later than intended

features.name: Smart Notifications
features.what: Context-aware reminders that fire based on your schedule: morning check-in 30min after planned wake, evening wind-down 30min before planned sleep
features.naturalMention: Smart notification systems can remind you to start winding down 30 minutes before your target bedtime, adapting to your actual schedule each day

features.name: 24-Hour Timeline
features.what: Visual day planner showing work blocks, sleep periods, and habit windows on a single timeline
features.naturalMention: A visual timeline of your day, showing when to sleep, work, and hit your habits, can make an abstract schedule feel concrete

mentionRules.preferGenericFirst: Mention the category of tool first, then SleepMedic as one example
mentionRules.formatAsInlineReference: Weave into existing advice, don't create a standalone paragraph about the app

examplesGood: Tracking your consistency over time -- apps like SleepMedic score this 0-100 -- reveals whether your habits are actually improving or just feel better.
If you're on rotating shifts, look for a sleep app that separates work-day and rest-day schedules. SleepMedic does this automatically.
One practical approach: map out your caffeine, meals, and wind-down on a visual timeline. Some apps generate this for you based on your shift schedule.
examplesBad: Download SleepMedic, the best sleep app!
SleepMedic is the only app that truly understands shift workers.
Use SleepMedic to fix all your sleep problems.
Unlike other apps, SleepMedic actually works.
